Added_Other.name: DFFlagEnableOverridingAndroidExitReasonsAsSuccess
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows custom exit reasons for Android apps to be marked as successful.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides clearer feedback to players on app exit reasons.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagSimParentPrimSpacePVsRead
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables reading of parent space properties in simulations for better performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy and efficiency of game physics for a smoother experience.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagSimCacheHumanoidScale2
Added_Physics.mechanism: Caches the scale of humanoid characters for quicker access.
Added_Physics.purpose: Makes character scaling faster and more efficient during gameplay.

Added_Physics.name: DFFlagTriangleMeshPartDefaultCollisionGeometry
Added_Physics.mechanism: Changes the default collision settings for triangle mesh parts in the game engine.
Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances the accuracy of physics interactions, making gameplay more realistic.
